'''mavudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbube|mbube]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbube|mbube]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mavudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mævidhith|mævidhith]] || [[word:mævidhij|mævidhij]] || [[word:mævidhish|mævidhish]] || [[word:mævidhi|mævidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mavuvudhuth|mavuvudhuth]] || [[word:mavuvudhuj|mavuvudhuj]] || [[word:mavuvudhush|mavuvudhush]] || [[word:mavuvudhu|mavuvudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mavudhuth|mavudhuth]] || [[word:mavudhuj|mavudhuj]] || [[word:mavudhush|mavudhush]] || [[word:mavudhu|mavudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mavufdhuth|mavufdhuth]] || [[word:mavufdhuj|mavufdhuj]] || [[word:mavufdhush|mavufdhush]] || [[word:mavufdhuf|mavufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mavudhuthu|mavudhuthu]] || [[word:mavudhuju|mavudhuju]] || [[word:mavudhushu|mavudhushu]] || [[word:mavudhuku|mavudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mavudhuth|mavudhuth]] || [[word:mavudhuj|mavudhuj]] || [[word:mavudhush|mavudhush]] || [[word:mavudhu|mavudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mavudhuthul|mavudhuthul]] || [[word:mavudhujul|mavudhujul]] || [[word:mavudhushul|mavudhushul]] || [[word:mavudhukul|mavudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mavudhuthuthu|mavudhuthuthu]] || [[word:mavudhujuju|mavudhujuju]] || [[word:mavudhushushu|mavudhushushu]] || [[word:mavudhuku|mavudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mavudhuthun|mavudhuthun]] || [[word:mavudhujun|mavudhujun]] || [[word:mavudhushun|mavudhushun]] || [[word:mavudhukun|mavudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mavudhuthuoro|mavudhuthuoro]] || [[word:mavudhujuoro|mavudhujuoro]] || [[word:mavudhushuoro|mavudhushuoro]] || [[word:mavudhukuoro|mavudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
